name: Tome of Hallowed Language
description: Notes Provides the strongest instant heal out of all tomes plus the stats for extra survivability.
effects: Heal: 150 (+1.045 per WIS over 70) HP Party Effect: Healing [75/s] (+0.5225 per WIS over 70) for 4.4 seconds Damage Nova: Explodes 2 times for 0.8 seconds within 2.5 sqrs
